song.title: Crown Him With Many Crowns
song.author: Godfrey Thring and Matthew Bridges
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Am F Em F Gsus G 1) Crown Him with many crowns, The Lamb upon His throne; .G C Am D G C G D G G7 Hark how the heavenly anthem drowns, All music but its own; . C F D G G7 Awake my soul and sing, Of Him who died for Thee, . C F Dm7 C Dm7 G C And hail Him as Thy matchless King Through all eternity.
[V2] .C Am F Em F Gsus G 2) Crown Him the Lord of life, Who triumphed o’er the grave; .G C Am D G C G D G G7 And rose victorious in the strife, For those He came to save; . C F D G G7 His glories now we sing, Who died and rose on high, . C F Dm7 C Dm7 G C Who died eternal life to bring And lives that death may die.
[V3] .C Am F Em F Gsus G 3) Crown Him the Lord of love, Behold His hands and side; .G C Am D G C G D G G7 Rich wounds yet visible above, In beauty glorified; . C F D G G7 All hail Redeemer hail, For Thou hast died for me, . C F Dm7 C Dm7 G C Thy praise shall never, Never fail, throughout eternity.
